test_cases.input_summary: Finding the press office for a multinational pharmaceutical company's regional division to request comment on a drug pricing story
test_cases.notes: Correctly distinguished between global and regional press offices. Outreach template was professional and appropriately urgent. Pitfalls about external PR agencies were highly relevant.

test_cases.input_summary: Locating the media contact for a small non-profit environmental organisation with no visible press page
test_cases.notes: Fallback strategies were genuinely useful for small organisations. LinkedIn approach was well-explained. Template was appropriately informal for a small NGO context.

test_cases.input_summary: Reaching the press office of a foreign government ministry to request comment on a diplomatic story, 24-hour deadline
test_cases.notes: Good adaptation to the government/diplomatic context. Embassy route was correctly prioritised. Time-zone considerations were flagged. Could have been slightly more concise for the tight deadline.
